THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PONCE ALVAREZ, IMPERIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORTEZ HUERTA, MARIO ANGELO $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,115.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR.
